name: Twisted Wonderland - Make your own scenario!
description:
'Make your own scenario' Twisted Wonderland bot! This is my second bot I've ever made, so I don't quite understand any of the terms for this website. Inaccuracies may occur.

!Bot does not include Yuu or Grim, or any of the story line🥓!

Be whatever persona you want, you can even be Yuu and add Grim yourself🖤
